_schema_note: Anthropic API pricing per million tokens. Used by skills/improve-skill/lib/budget.py for shadow-USD enforcement when CC's --max-budget-usd isn't available (i.e., non-print-mode contexts). Per ADR-006 plugin-versioning discipline, bumps to this file are bound to plugin minor or patch releases. See references/cc-flag-watch.md for when we can drop this dependency.

alias_resolution._note: Maps common CLI aliases (e.g., 'sonnet', 'opus', 'haiku') to canonical model IDs. budget.py uses this to resolve unknown model strings.

_warning: These are placeholder values for V1 scaffolding. BEFORE first plugin release, verify against Anthropic's current pricing page and update both pricing_usd_per_million_tokens AND valid_as_of. /ren:doctor warns when valid_as_of is >60 days stale.
